items.Title: iOS 12 Support is Ending
items.Details:
Hi Survivors!

We're making updates to ensure Free Fire stays compatible with the latest iOS versions. As part of this, the minimum supported iOS version will be raised to [b]iOS 13[/b].
[b]Who is affected?[/b] Only players on [b]iOS 12 devices (iPhone 6 and older)[/b] that cannot be upgraded to iOS 13 such as iPhone 5s, iPhone 6, and iPhone 6 Plus. Android players and iOS 13+ players are not affected.

[b]Free Fire MAX:[/b] iOS 12 support will end with the [b]June 24 patch update[/b]. After this date, players on iOS 12 will no longer be able to launch or play Free Fire MAX.

[b]Free Fire:[/b] iOS 12 support will continue through the [b]June 24 patch update[/b], giving affected players time to make the switch. Support will officially end with the [b]September 16 patch update[/b].

If you're on an affected device, act now:
[b]Bind your Guest account[/b] to a supported login method
[b]Set up a recovery email[/b] to protect your progress
[b]Plan to switch[/b] to a compatible device before September 16

We apologize for the inconvenience and thank you for your understanding.
